locale.description: Locale used for SDD templates and skills.

context.description: Project context (tech stack, conventions, constraints). Replaces project.md.

rules.description: Per-artifact rules. Map of artifact_id -> string[].

extra_skills.description: Additional optional SDD skills to enable. Valid values: llman-sdd-new-change, llman-sdd-continue, llman-sdd-ff, llman-sdd-sync, llman-sdd-validate.

archive.description: Archive behaviour settings (defer tracking, completion gates).

strict_defer.description: When true, unchecked tasks without a defer link are errors (not just warnings). Default: false (transition period).

min_completion_ratio.description: Minimum task completion ratio (0.0–1.0) required for archiving. Default: none (disabled).

bdd.description: BDD integration settings. When defined, enables feature_refs validation and BDD-aware verify prompts.

feature_dir.description: Root directory for .feature files, relative to project root.

verify_prompt.description: Extra prompt text injected during verify phase.
